instructions:
Browser strategy: use the right tool for each task.

[Text/Data tasks] Use agent-browser CLI (/opt/homebrew/bin/agent-browser) via shell — much cheaper on tokens:
- agent-browser open <url>
- agent-browser snapshot  (returns accessibility tree with @refs)
- agent-browser click @ref / agent-browser fill @ref "text"
- agent-browser get text @ref
Use this for: news scraping, article extraction, search, forms, any text-based page.

[Image downloading] To save article images: use agent-browser eval "JSON.stringify([...document.querySelectorAll('article img, .content img')].map(i=>i.src))" to extract image URLs, then download with curl -o workspace/images/<filename> <url>. Always save images alongside the markdown report.

[Visual tasks] Use built-in browser tools (browser_navigate, browser_click, browser_screenshot) via CDP (http://127.0.0.1:18888):
Use this for: games, canvas, charts, captcha, anything requiring visual understanding.

Do not use web_search or browser_get_markdown.
